prompt:
Title: Hyke AI Dashboard - Tech Noir Stepper
Context: B2B SaaS Dashboard for Hyke AI, focused on high-conversion and premium aesthetics for a WhatsApp AI sales platform.
Description of the screen: Dashboard Home Screen for Hyke AI, variant 3 of 3. 
- Theme: Futuristic Tech-Noir, using deep black (bg-black) and razor-thin borders (border-white/10).
- Navigation: Left sidebar (implied context) with the main area showing a clean 'Activity Hub'.
- Header: Integrated search bar and profile section at the top.
- Stats: Metric cards use a 'frosted glass' look with higher opacity (bg-white/5) and vivid icons from Lucide.
- Setup Guide: A horizontal timeline or 'Stepper' component at the top of the main content area to immediately grab attention, using a gradient line to connect steps.
- Buttons: High-gloss finish with subtle inner shadows and external glows.
- Feature Highlight: A small 'Whats New' card at the bottom right with a subtle emerald glow to encourage feature discovery.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
